lore.dummmmmmy.target_dummy: An object that when struck by weapons, shows damage dealt. Can be equipped with armor to test damage negation. Needs to be shift-clicked on in order to actually destroy and pick back up.
entity.dummmmmmy.target_dummy.descriptio: An object that when struck by weapons, shows damage dealt. Can be equipped with armor to test damage negation. Needs to be shift-clicked on in order to actually destroy and pick back up.
